title: eryngium humile var. stellatum
intro: Eryngium humile var. stellatum, also known as the variegated sea holly, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Apiaceae family. It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Eryngium humile var. stellatum include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its use as an antiseptic to prevent infection and promote wound healing. Eryngium humile var. stellatum is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and it may also be used in herbal tinctures, salves, and creams to harness its medicinal properties.
